summary: SEO Features and English Translation Testing COMPLETE. All 14 backend SEO tests passed. Admin Dashboard SEO tab fully functional with AI-powered analysis, keyword suggestions, and content generation. Landing page and authentication pages display in English as primary language. The AI Analysis using Emergent LLM Key is working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - hydration error in AdminOverview table rendering, appears to be from Visual Editor wrapper

critical_code_review_comments: SEO router properly configured at /api/seo with all endpoints working
AI integration using Emergent LLM Key functioning correctly for keyword suggestions and SEO analysis
Language selector shows EN/FR flags in navbar for bilingual support
Google Analytics 4 script placeholder present in index.html - needs actual GA_MEASUREMENT_ID to be activated
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO features fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/seo/sitemap.xml (XML), /api/seo/robots.txt (text), /api/seo/analytics/overview (JSON), /api/seo/keywords/suggestions (AI-powered), /api/seo/analyze (AI SEO analysis), /api/seo/content/generate (AI content). Admin SEO tab at 'SEO & Analytics' has 4 sub-tabs: Overview, Keywords, AI Analysis, Content Generator. Landing page at / displays in English. Client auth at /client. Merchant auth at /merchant.

sitemap_xml.returns: Valid XML with 10 URLs including root, auth pages, policy pages

robots_txt.returns: Proper robots.txt with Allow/Disallow directives and sitemap reference

analytics_overview.returns: JSON with overview stats, SEO metrics, target keywords

keyword_suggestions.returns: AI-generated keyword list with category, difficulty, search volume estimates

seo_analyze.returns: AI-powered SEO analysis with score, recommendations, keyword analysis, meta suggestions

content_generate.returns: AI-generated SEO content based on content_type and topic params

seo_history.returns: List of past SEO analyses stored in database
